stories.title: Create config-centralization skill structure
stories.description: Create directory structure and boilerplate files for config-centralization skill in skills/core/config-centralization/
acceptanceCriteria: All files have basic content (not empty)
stories.notes: Implemented by Ralph++ Phase 2.2 autonomous implementation. Created complete skill structure with README (30 lines), SKILL.md (128 lines), and install.sh (79 lines). All acceptance criteria verified.

stories.title: Extract reusable code for config-centralization
acceptanceCriteria: No external dependencies on non-portable code
stories.notes: Implemented by fresh context agent (iteration 2). Created ConfigManager with type-safe configuration management, environment-aware defaults, validation, and singleton pattern. Files: config-manager.ts (140 lines), types.ts (60 lines), index.ts (15 lines). All exports working, fully typed, no external dependencies.

stories.title: Write tests for config-centralization
stories.description: Create comprehensive test suite to validate skill functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created in tests/ directory
stories.notes: Implemented by fresh context agent (iteration 3). Created comprehensive test suite with 26 tests covering: singleton pattern, configuration loading, environment detection, required field validation, get/set/has/getAll methods, and integration scenarios. All tests passing (26/26). Coverage > 70% verified.

stories.title: Document config-centralization skill
stories.description: Write complete documentation with usage examples
acceptanceCriteria: SKILL.md complete with: description, features, installation, usage
stories.notes: Implemented by fresh context agent (iteration 4). Completely rewrote SKILL.md (407 lines) and README.md (127 lines) with accurate documentation based on actual implementation. Included: real code examples from tests, complete API reference, troubleshooting guide with solutions, environment variables documentation, integration examples, best practices, and testing guide. All examples match actual ConfigManager implementation.

stories.title: Create install script for config-centralization
stories.description: Write automated installation script that copies files and sets up dependencies
stories.notes: Implemented by fresh context agent (iteration 5). Completely rewrote install.sh (127 lines) with robust installation logic. Features: auto-detects skill directory and project root, validates all required files exist before copying, copies config-manager.ts/types.ts/index.ts to lib/config/, verifies installation success, shows clear success/error messages with next steps. Script works from both skill directory and project root. Tested successfully.
